characters.name: Gupta
characters.description: GuptaCharacter informationFull nameGuptaOccupationRoyal Detective formerlyGenderMale ♂FateRetires as Royal Detective of Jalpur  and travels to solve mysteries around the worldGupta is a minor recurring character  of the animated series,Mira, Royal Detective. He is the former Royal Detective of the kingdom of Jalpur, being the predecessor of the current  Royal Detective he serves as a great inspiration  to Mira famed by her for his cases and his favored moto'' When solving a mystery gets tough look closer.''at some unknown period he retired from his position becoming succeeded by Mira  devoting his days in journeying across the world in search for mysteries that need resolved.

characters.name: Mira
characters.description: MiraमीराBackground informationTelevision programsMira, Royal DetectiveVoiceLeela LadnierCharacter informationOther namesPrincess HeeraBeti (by her father)GirlPersonalityBrave, resourceful, clever, kind-hearted, nice, smart, self-sacrificing, intelligent, sophisticated, loyal, honest, selfless, brilliant, inquisitiveAppearanceSlender, olive skin, rosy cheeks, mole under her right eye, long dark brownish black hair, thick eyebrows, hazel eyesAge9 (formerly 8)OccupationRoyal DetectiveGenderFemale ♀AlignmentGoodGoalTo solving crimesHelping othersHomeJalpurRelativesSahil(father)Unnamed mother(deceased)Pushpa(aunt)Meena(cousin)Priya(cousin)PetsMikku and ChikkuAlliesQueen ShantiPrince Neel(best friend)KamalaPinkyPrince VeerPriya(cousin/best friend)RanjeetManjeetSandeepPrincess ShivaniEnemiesPoodam, ManishLikesSolving mysteriesHer familyNeel's inventionsHer friendsSamosasPriya's clothesDancingBeing a royal detectiveHelping others in needDislikesTroubleMeena's self-centered behaviorFailed casesBeing caged, caught, jailed, or kidnappedPossessionsMagnifying glassNotebookFateAliveQuote"I'm Mira, Royal Detective!"Mirais the main protagonist of the animated series,Mira, Royal Detective. She is a brave and resourceful commoner who becomes the royal detective after solving a mystery that saved the kingdom's young prince. She isPushpa's niece andMeenaandPriya's cousin. As the royal detective, Mira travels throughout the kingdom helping royals and commoners alike, and will stop at nothing to solve a case.[1] Mira is a kind and intelligent girl, and she's willing to help with any case that comes her way whether it's searching for a missing bicycle or the reason for something strange to happen. When it comes to solving a case, she's not one to jump to conclusions, and she won't come to a conclusion until she gets all the facts.

As the royal detective, Mira travels throughout the kingdom helping royals and commoners alike, and will stop at nothing to solve a case.[1] Mira is a kind and intelligent girl, and she's willing to help with any case that comes her way whether it's searching for a missing bicycle or the reason for something strange to happen. When it comes to solving a case, she's not one to jump to conclusions, and she won't come to a conclusion until she gets all the facts.

characters.name: Naveen
characters.description: NaveenनवीनBackground informationTelevision programsMira, Royal DetectiveVoiceKunal NayyarCharacter informationGenderMale ♂RelativesPushpa(wife)Meena(elder daughter)Priya(younger daughter)Chotu(youngest son)Mira(niece)Sahil(Brother in Law) Naveenis a character in the Disney Junior animated series,Mira, Royal Detective. He is the father of Meena, Priya, and Chotu andMira's uncle. He hasn't been seen until the episode "Mystery at the Marketplace". He was very happy to be reunited with his wife and children, and he was also happy to see his niece Mira.

characters.name: Prince Neel
characters.description: Prince NeelBackground informationTelevision programsMira, Royal DetectiveVoiceKamran LucasCharacter informationPersonalityKind, caring, loving, smart, inventive, helpful, clumsy, nervousAge11OccupationPrince ofJalpurGenderMale ♂AlignmentGoodHomeJalpurRelativesUnnamed fatherQueen Shanti(mother)Prince Veer(older brother)PetsAdrika (mynah bird)AlliesMira(best friend)Princess ShivaniPriyaMikku and ChikkuLikesInventing, helping Mira solve cases, his older brother and mother, samosasDislikesHis brother being overprotective, his mother's jewels stolen, letting his family down, crashingFateAliveQuote"Soggy samosas!"Prince Neelis a prince ofJalpur, a talented inventor and a main character inMira, Royal Detective. He isMiraandPriya's friend and also possibly has a crush on Mira. Neel is a prince who has tan skin and black hair. He has a long white shirt covered by a light blue vest. He wears baggy yellowish-tan pants and blue clogs.

characters.name: Queen Shanti
characters.description: Queen ShantiBackground informationTelevision programsMira, Royal DetectiveVoiceFreida PintoCharacter informationOther namesYour MajestyMother (by Veer and Neel)The Secret Gift GiverPersonalityWise, elegant, motherly, soft-spoken, level-headed, supportive, modest, selflessOccupationQueen ofJalpurGenderFemale ♀AlignmentGoodHomeJalpurRelativesPrince Veer(eldest son)Prince Neel(youngest son)PetsAdrikaAlliesMiraFateAliveQueen Shantiis the mother ofPrince VeerandPrince Neeland a secondary character inMira, Royal Detective. She is voiced byFreida Pinto. She is the queen of Jalpur. Queen Shanti has olive skin, brown eyes, and long dark brown hair. She is usually seen wearing a red dress with gold details. Queen Shanti is a loving mother and cares for the people of her kingdom.
